capsules.name: Exact Replication vs Recreation
capsules.trigger: User references existing implementation ('like the HTML page', 'same as X', 'match Y')
capsules.learning: Ask explicitly: 'Copy the existing code exactly, or adapt/recreate?' Before implementing, check if there's existing code to reference.

capsules.name: Verification Before Execution
capsules.trigger: User phrases: 'tell me what you understood', 'confirm first', 'check with me'
capsules.learning: Stop. Explain understanding in your own words. Wait for explicit 'yes' or correction before any action.

capsules.name: Enumerate UI Elements
capsules.trigger: User mentions UI element type without specificity ('the buttons', 'the cards', 'the links')
capsules.learning: List all instances you found: 'I see 3 buttons: A, B, C. Update all or specific ones?'

capsules.name: Match Response to Question Specificity
capsules.learning: Short question = short answer. Provide details only if requested or obviously needed.

capsules.name: Visual Layout Clarification
capsules.trigger: User requests layout change ('make it compact', 'reorganize', 'change layout')
capsules.learning: Ask for visual description: 'Stack vertically, side-by-side, or grid?' or provide ASCII mockup for confirmation.

capsules.name: Assume Unless Critical
capsules.learning: For low-risk changes, proceed without asking. For destructive/irreversible actions, always confirm.
